positive: A vibrant, stylized forest landscape silhouette, featuring interconnected flora and fauna elements like howling wolves, flying deer, and glowing mushrooms. The scene should have a strong, cohesive, dark indigo and emerald green color palette with pops of bioluminescent teal and gold accents. Composition must be perfectly symmetrical and highly detailed, suitable for a repeating textile pattern. Focus on clean, bold outlines and deep contrast, with elements arranged to create a striking, gothic symmetry. Minimalist illustrative style, vector art quality, high contrast, perfect symmetry, seamless repeat pattern, central focus.
